notes: I experience a couple of crashes to desktop when loading a track. I also encountered a glitch where the rankings info that displays after completing a track lost its text but I wasn't able to reproduce it after closing and restarting the game.
title: TrackMania² Valley

notes: Same performance when running on windows. Perfect !
title: TrackMania² Valley

notes:
i'm not a fan of valley, i dislike the feel, and it seems like a reskin of stadium.
due to this, I only tested the first track. reset it a few times, and then left.
so i'll say it's not a comprehensive test.
I also installed this via the mania launcher, which is installed via canyons, which i DID test for quite some time.
if canyon is a indication (and it should be, they are basically tweaks of eachother game code wise), then it should hold up perfectly like it did.
title: TrackMania² Valley

notes: Disable Max/FPS in compatibility window : the game runs smoother
title: TrackMania² Valley
